test.create_query: CREATE TABLE t_{size}_{partitions} (a UInt64, b UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY a PARTITION BY sipHash64(a) % {partitions}
CREATE TABLE t_skew_{size}_{partitions} (a UInt64, b UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple() PARTITION BY a
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO t_{size}_{partitions} SELECT number, number FROM numbers_mt({size})
INSERT INTO t_skew_{size}_{partitions} SELECT if(number % 10 < 9, number % 3, 3 + (number % 27)) AS a, number AS b FROM numbers_mt({size})
test.query: SELECT a FROM t_{size}_{partitions} LIMIT 10 BY a FORMAT Null
SELECT a FROM t_{size}_{partitions} WHERE b > 1 LIMIT 10 BY a FORMAT Null
SELECT a, b FROM t_{size}_{partitions} LIMIT 10 BY a, b FORMAT Null
SELECT a FROM t_{size}_{partitions} LIMIT 100000000 BY a FORMAT Null
SELECT a FROM t_{size}_{partitions} ORDER BY b DESC LIMIT 10 BY a FORMAT Null
SELECT a FROM t_skew_{size}_{partitions} LIMIT 10 BY a FORMAT Null
